calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Action For Failure To Timely Serve Summons And Petition
Off Calendar Oct-14-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RESPONDENT CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF REAL ESTATE'S MOTION TO DISMISS ACTION FOR FAILURE TO TIMELY SERVE SUMMONS AND PETITION.

Appearances: Caroline C. Lam of the Office of the Attorney General (213.269.6224) for respondent and moving party; Albert J. Garcia (510.848.5190) for petitioner and opposing party.

Argued and the court takes the motion under submission. Judge: Samuel K. Feng, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (302/SKF)
